item.title:

Cameron Menzies produces a spectacular 104.50 average to blow Raymon
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 1min SUPERB FROM MENZIES!
Cameron Menzies produces a spectacular 104.50 average to blow Raymond van Barneveld away in Sindelfingen!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 0:35 1 10 512

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min Cameron Menzies has stunned five-time World Champion Raymond van Barneveld with an incredible 10
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min Cameron Menzies has stunned five-time World Champion Raymond van Barneveld with an incredible 104.50 average to sink the Dutchman.
Cammy has maintained his perfect record against Barney, winning all five meetings.
He'll face Ross Smith tomorrow.
In association with Mostrar más 16

Cameron Menzies produces a clinical display to defeat Raymond van Barneveld 6-3 with four 180s and a 104.5 average 2 2 1 207

item.title: phillbarrs: Phill Barrs @phillbarrs · 4min Great game that. The best Cammy has looked since the Worlds and Barney showed some fight
